title: Supporting information
description: Information to help you complete your paper tax return or tax return supplement.

child_links.title: Amounts that you do not pay tax on 2023
child_links.description: Information about those amounts that you do not pay tax on.

child_links.title: Special circumstances and glossary 2023
child_links.description: Special circumstances affecting how your tax is calculated and a glossary of terms used in the tax return instructions.

child_links.title: Car and travel expenses 2023
child_links.description: You may be able to claim deductions for work-related car expenses and work-related travel expenses.

child_links.title: Claiming deductions 2023
child_links.description: You may be able to claim deductions for work-related expenses you incurred while performing your job as an employee.

child_links.title: Rebate income 2023
child_links.description: Work out your rebate income and if you're eligible for the seniors and pensioners tax offset at question T1.

child_links.title: Referred publications 2023
child_links.description: Use these publications to help you understand your tax obligations and prepare your 2023 tax return.

child_links.title: Checklist - tax return 2023
child_links.description: Complete the tax return checklist to avoid any delays when you lodge your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Checklist - supplement 2023
child_links.description: Complete the supplementary checklist to make sure you have completed your supplementary tax return before lodgment.
